jobs.name: Daily Morning Briefing
jobs.description: Compile and deliver Dr. D's morning practice summary

payload.message: Good morning. Compile today's daily briefing: check today's appointments, count new leads since yesterday, review pending follow-ups due this week, check for overdue follow-ups, and check pending secure uploads. Write the summary to daily-status.json and deliver it to me.

jobs.name: Follow-up Queue Review
jobs.description: Check for patients due for follow-up and draft recall emails

payload.message: Review all patients with next_followup dates within the next 7 days. For any due this week, draft appropriate recall emails to the outbox. Update follow-up-queue.json. Report what you drafted.

jobs.name: End of Day Summary
jobs.description: Quick summary of today's activity and tomorrow's schedule

payload.message: End of day. Summarize today: how many appointments were completed, any no-shows, new leads received, emails drafted. Then preview tomorrow's schedule. Keep it brief.
